raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, I arrived at the XXXX XXXX gate on time while passengers were still boarding. Despite this, the gate agent refused to allow me to board, spoke to me in a loud and disrespectful manner, and denied me travel during a time of personal grief following my sisters death. A XXXX XXXX employee witnessed the incident, intervened, and assisted me in securing a same day replacement flight to XXXX XXXX 
I did not cancel my XXXX reservation, nor was I a no show. I was present, prepared to board, and improperly denied boarding due to the gate agents conduct not any failure on my part. XXXX  claim that I did not arrive on time is incorrect and misleading. 
On XX/XX/year>, the return flight was immediately canceled due to the negative experience that transpired with XXXX XXXX. This left me in an inconvenient situation having to resort to other means on returning home to XXXX. 
This packet includes new supporting documentation, including proof of the XXXX XXXX replacement ticket, records of my contact with XXXX, a sworn statement, a witness style narrative, and a detailed statement of the gate agents behavior. I respectfully request that Barclays reopen and reinvestigate Case XXXX XXXXXXXX under the Fair Credit Billing Act ( FCBA ).
